subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Name beareth witness amidst the nations that there is none other God but Him, the All-Powerful, the All-Compelling, the Mighty, the Most Exalted, Who hath appeared in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الاسم الاعظم بین الامم انه لا اله الا هو المقتدر المهیمن العزیز المتعال قد ظهر بالحق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @justice and wrath of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
